description: Engine consumption rules for the Construction DNA kernel stack

consumers.usage: Pattern family classification using taxonomy nodes. Material property lookup for constraint evaluation.
Material property validation during execution pipeline. Compatibility checking during assembly validation.
Ingestion pipeline that feeds scraped material data into Material DNA Kernel admission queue. Does NOT directly mutate kernel — feeds admission queue only.

rules: Engines consume kernel truth via typed contracts
Engines may NOT mutate kernel truth
Engines may NOT bypass kernel contracts
Engines may cache kernel data for performance but must respect version freshness
